display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Live: 2026 The Amundi Evian Championship
programme.desc: From Evian Resort Golf Club in Évian-les-Bains, Haute-Savoie, France.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Round 3 of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open continues at The Renaissance Club in Scotland. The round features only players who made the 36-hole cut. Top players aim for the winner's share of $1.62 million and 500 FedEx Cup standings points.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Kaulig Companies Championship
programme.desc: From Firestone Country Club South Course in Akron, Ohio.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Round 3 of the 2026 ISCO Championship continues at Hurstbourne Country Club. Moving Day gets underway as players who survived the cut compete for a share of the $4 million. Competitors will play in twosomes off the first tee by leaderboard standing.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Round 3 of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open continues at The Renaissance Club in Scotland. The round features only players who made the 36-hole cut. Top players aim for the winner's share of $1.62 million and 500 FedEx Cup standings points.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Round 3 of the 2026 ISCO Championship continues at Hurstbourne Country Club. Moving Day gets underway as players who survived the cut compete for a share of the $4 million. Competitors will play in twosomes off the first tee by leaderboard standing.

programme.title: 2026 Kaulig Companies Championship
programme.desc: From Firestone Country Club South Course in Akron, Ohio.

programme.title: Live: 2026 The Amundi Evian Championship
programme.desc: From Evian Resort Golf Club in Évian-les-Bains, Haute-Savoie, France.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Final Round of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open continues at The Renaissance Club in Scotland. The final 18-hole loop will crown the champion and determine the division of the $9 million purse. The winner claims $1.62 million and 500 FedEx points.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Kaulig Companies Championship
programme.desc: From Firestone Country Club South Course in Akron, Ohio.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Final Round of the ISCO Championship 2026 continues at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville. The final 18-hole loop crowns the champion, awards 300 FedEx Cup points, and determines the distribution of the $4 million total purse.

programme.title: Live: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Final Round of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open continues at The Renaissance Club in Scotland. The final 18-hole loop will crown the champion and determine the division of the $9 million purse. The winner claims $1.62 million and 500 FedEx points.

programme.title: SIGN OFF
programme.desc: Sign off.

programme.title: SIGN OFF
programme.desc: Sign off.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: Becoming Wild
programme.desc: See what a day in the life on the Minnesota Wild roster looks like.

programme.title: Inside the NBHL
programme.desc: Inside the NBHL is the National Ball Hockey League's monthly show featuring league-wide power rankings, top plays and the biggest storylines from across the NBHL.

programme.title: NHL Network Originals: The First NHL Winter Classic, Hockey Goes Outside
programme.desc: A look back at Sidney Crosby's break-out performance, the remarkable snow globe-like atmosphere during the game, and the positive response to whether an outdoor NHL game could happen.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Rangers travel south to face the Panthers in a high-stakes match. Florida, the back-to-back Stanley Cup champion, looks to remain the top team in the Eastern Conference. Captain Aleksander Barkov is out for the season because of a major injury.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: From Oct. 29, 2023.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: 2025 Stadium Series. From March 1, 2025. From Ohio Stadium.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: From Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, Fla.

programme.title: NHL Network Countdown
programme.desc: NHL Network counts down great plays and memorable moments in hockey history.

programme.title: Becoming Wild
programme.desc: See what a day in the life on the Minnesota Wild roster looks like.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Rangers travel south to face the Panthers in a high-stakes match. Florida, the back-to-back Stanley Cup champion, looks to remain the top team in the Eastern Conference. Captain Aleksander Barkov is out for the season because of a major injury.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: 2025 Winter Classic. From Dec. 31, 2024. From Wrigley Field.

programme.title: NHL Network Originals: The First NHL Winter Classic, Hockey Goes Outside
programme.desc: A look back at Sidney Crosby's break-out performance, the remarkable snow globe-like atmosphere during the game, and the positive response to whether an outdoor NHL game could happen.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: From Feb. 18, 2024.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: 2025 Stadium Series. From March 1, 2025. From Ohio Stadium.

programme.title: Becoming Wild
programme.desc: See what a day in the life on the Minnesota Wild roster looks like.

programme.title: NHL Network Originals: The First NHL Winter Classic, Hockey Goes Outside
programme.desc: A look back at Sidney Crosby's break-out performance, the remarkable snow globe-like atmosphere during the game, and the positive response to whether an outdoor NHL game could happen.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: From Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, Fla.

programme.title: Inside the NBHL
programme.desc: Inside the NBHL is the National Ball Hockey League's monthly show featuring league-wide power rankings, top plays and the biggest storylines from across the NBHL.

programme.title: Pioneers
programme.desc: Sit-down interview with one of the greatest players to ever play the game, "Mr. Hockey" Gordie Howe.

programme.title: Pioneers
programme.desc: Four-time Stanley Cup Champion, Ted Lindsay talks about his career in the NHL.

programme.title: Stanley Cup Films
programme.desc: The Detroit Red Wings meet the defending champion Montreal Canadiens in the 1954 Stanley Cup final.

programme.title: Stanley Cup Films
programme.desc: The Montreal Canadiens face the defending champion Detroit Red Wings in the 1955 Stanley Cup Final.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Mark Messier scored a hat trick on April 14, 1983.

programme.title: NHL Trophy Case
programme.desc: Diving into the Hart Trophy, the Vezina Trophy and the Lady Byng; featuring bites from marquee NHL players Tom Wilson, Leon Draisaitl, Connor McDavid, Robert Thomas, David Pastrnak and Morgan Rielly.

programme.title: NHL Trophy Case
programme.desc: NHL Trophy Case is a limited-run documentary series that takes a deep dive into the history, lore, and special meaning of the NHL's most storied trophies.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Avalanche face the Kings at Crypto.com Arena for Game 4. Colorado leads 3-0 after a 4-2 Game 3 win. Cale Makar scored the tiebreaker, and Brock Nelson sealed the victory with an empty-net goal. Moore and Kempe provided the scoring for the Kings.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Boston Bruins battle Buffalo Sabres in Game 5 of their playoff series at KeyBank Center. Buffalo holds a commanding 3-1 advantage in the best-of-seven series following a dominant 6-1 victory over Boston in Game 4 of the crucial postseason matchup.

programme.title: NESN Rundown
programme.desc: The best segments from today's NESN podcasts.

programme.title: Wicked Bites
programme.desc: We're touring Metrowest's best patio dining and scenic spots in the Lakes Region. Plus, we go behind the scenes at Danvers' legendary Putnam Pantry to explore their historic candy kitchen and world-famous ice cream.

programme.title: Dining Playbook With Billy and Jenny
programme.desc: A sports-themed look at the New England dining and lifestyle scene featuring celebrity chefs and favorite restaurants of local athletes.

programme.title: Meet Boston With Billy & Jenny
programme.desc: Boston influencers showcase different areas of the city and off-the-radar things to do.

programme.title: Under Eye Bags? SOLUTION!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Under Eye Bags? SOLUTION!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie travels to Cape Cod in search of sea bass, but bad weather puts the fishing in jeopardy. So, the crew decides to fish for stripers in-shore. Charlie visits the Red Nun Bar & Grill to try their naked burger.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Local comedian Paul Gilligan faces his toughest act to date, hanging out with the Mad Fisherman. Paul takes Charlie to his hometown of Ipswich, Massachusetts. Paul takes Charlie to his favorite Greek restaurant, as well as his favorite steakhouse.

programme.title: Cruisin' New England
programme.desc: Paul Mennett heads to the Berkshires to visit Jay Hanlon to drive a vintage tractor, a vintage snow cat, as well as fly in a vintage airplane.

programme.title: Cruisin' New England
programme.desc: Paul Mennett visits an old friend to see his "no-limits" car collection including rare foreign sports cars. You'll see a rare 1954 XK120 Jaguar, also pedal cars and a vintage wooden boat.

programme.title: Red Sox Almanac
programme.desc: A look back at the 1994 Red Sox season, a season cut short by the MLB strike on August 12th, becoming the first year without a champion since 1904. The Red Sox finished 54-61 led by Scott Cooper and franchise players Mo Vaughn and Roger Clemens.

programme.title: Live: Red Sox First Pitch
programme.desc: A preview of the upcoming game and news and analysis from industry insiders.

programme.title: Red Sox GameDay Live
programme.desc: The latest pregame news and commentary about the Red Sox, plus exclusive features and analysis with former players and writers.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Red Sox take on the Mets as they continue their three-game series at Citi Field. Right-handed Freddy Peralta is the expected starter for the Mets. Slugger Willson Contreras leads the Red Sox in home runs, batting average and RBIs.

programme.title: Red Sox Extra Innings Live
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players, and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Live: Red Sox Final
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Live: USL Cup Soccer
programme.desc: From Fitzpatrick Stadium in Portland, Maine.

programme.title: Up The Hearts Documentary
programme.desc: An inside look at the lead up to the Portland Hearts of Pine inaugural season in USL League One.

programme.title: Grass Routes
programme.desc: Showcasing the connection between Minor League Baseball and the Portland Sea Dogs community.

programme.title: NESN Clubhouse
programme.desc: Bella learns the ins-and-outs of the sport of rugby courtesy of the Boston Banshees women's rugby team.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie goes fly fishing in western Massachusetts with Harry Desmond and checks out local craft beers and restaurants.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Max Lane played seven seasons in the NFL. Today, Charlie invites Max to his favorite lake - Lake Winnipesaukee, but Max has a hard time staying on the boat. Max and Charlie visit a local restaurant in town called The Wolfetrap.

programme.title: Dirty Water TV
programme.desc: The best parties, hottest venues, and coolest destinations in New England nightlife.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Red Sox take on the Mets as they continue their three-game series at Citi Field. Right-handed Freddy Peralta is the expected starter for the Mets. Slugger Willson Contreras leads the Red Sox in home runs, batting average and RBIs.

programme.title: Red Sox Extra Innings Live
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players, and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Red Sox Final
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Fight Sports MMA
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features Amanda "Mad Dog" Lino vs. Manon Fiorot from EFC 83 in Pretoria, South Africa.

programme.title: World Championship Kickboxing
programme.desc: Highlights from some of the world's greatest kickboxing matches.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Red Sox take on the Mets as they continue their three-game series at Citi Field. Right-handed Freddy Peralta is the expected starter for the Mets. Slugger Willson Contreras leads the Red Sox in home runs, batting average and RBIs.

programme.title: Golf Destination
programme.desc: An in-depth look at some of the world's greatest golf courses.

programme.title: A Fishing Story
programme.desc: We journey to the beautiful island of Jamaica to explore its vibrant culture, stunning waters, and local charm through the eyes of Deryk Meany, the General Manager at Sandals.

programme.title: New England Traveler
programme.desc: Greg travels to the scenic town of Chatham on Cape Cod. He heads over to Stick'N Rudder Aero Tours and takes to the skies in a vintage biplane. Greg also visits the historic Chatham Railroad Museum, enjoys some amazing sushi and more.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Anthony travels to historic Kittery, Maine and starts off his trip with a visit to Lil's Café for a famous cruller, then off to When Pigs Fly to check out their pizza. Anthony also visits a museum, a candy store and tries some unique seltzers.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Under Eye Bags? SOLUTION!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: NESN Clubhouse
programme.desc: Bella learns the ins-and-outs of the sport of rugby courtesy of the Boston Banshees women's rugby team.

programme.title: Live: Red Sox First Pitch
programme.desc: A preview of the upcoming game and news and analysis from industry insiders.

programme.title: Red Sox GameDay Live
programme.desc: The latest pregame news and commentary about the Red Sox, plus exclusive features and analysis with former players and writers.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citi Field in Flushing, N.Y.

programme.title: Red Sox Extra Innings Live
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players, and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Live: Red Sox Final
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie hooks up with 18-year MLB player and Hall of Famer Wade Boggs; Charlie and Wade fish the world-famous Charles River in Boston; Wade takes Charlie to the 7-20-4 Lounge for an impromptu interview; Wade and Charlie compare World Series rings.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie heads out with NHL Hall of Famer Ray Bourque to attend Ray's Celebrities for Charity event. Ray challenges Mad Fish to catch some bass out on the course. Charlie bumps into a bunch of NHL legends and sneaks in a free golf lesson.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Anthony heads to Tewksbury, Mass., for a visit to Wamesit Lanes Family Entertainment Center. Owner Donny MacLaren gives Anthony a VIP tour and takes part in dart throwing, shuffleboard, bowling, arcades and some great burgers.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Join in as we unlock New Hampshire's gate city. We are heading to Nashua for a day packed of nostalgia at Fun World followed by some authentic Italian dishes, sweet treats and a local beer flight to top things off.

programme.title: Cruisin' New England
programme.desc: Paul Mennett heads to the Berkshires to visit Jay Hanlon to drive a vintage tractor, a vintage snow cat, as well as fly in a vintage airplane.

programme.title: Outside the Fame
programme.desc: An in-depth look into the lives of current and former New England athletes that Boston fans may not otherwise have a chance to see.

programme.desc: DraftKings Casino, a top-rated casino app!

programme.desc: NY Times Best Selling Author and Golf Channel's Matt Adams brings you inside the ropes where you'll get all the headlines, exclusive interviews with all of golf's stars, equipment updates, instruction for your game and so much more.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Golf tips, equipment reviews and golf course features.

programme.title: Giants Access Blue
programme.desc: Everything you need to know about your NY Giants.

programme.desc: Opening Round coverage of 8 countries (including powers like the USA, Canada, Sweden and Finland) battling for the World Championship of 3-on-3 Ice Hockey.

programme.title: Best of Islanders
programme.desc: From Feb. 26, 2026.

programme.title: 3ICE
programme.desc: Coverage of three-on-three professional ice hockey action.

programme.title: Poker
programme.desc: Poker action from tournaments around the world.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In the final part of our story, we experience the incredible highs and devastating lows on and off the pitch as Alisson becomes a Reds legend and makes Liverpool his home.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of memorable goals scored by Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: Liverpool¿s Greatest
programme.desc: The winner of our Liverpools Greatest poll is revealed. See who is crowned the Reds' best men's player of all time, after a huge vote with the views of fans, former players, journalists and more.

programme.title: Robbo: All the goals and assists
programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of goals and assists by Andy Robertson.

programme.title: Flags and Banners: The Art of LFC
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary which delves into the history and culture of the club's flags and banners.

programme.title: Retro Review Show
programme.desc: Steven Gerrard joins Neil Mellor to analyse the action and talk through the stats from the 2005 Champions league Final.

programme.title: Salah: Farewell to The King
programme.desc: An exclusive LFC Original documentary celebrating Mohamed Salah¿s extraordinary legacy at Liverpool.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: Robbo: My Liverpool
programme.desc: An exclusive LFC Original documentary paying tribute to Andy Robertson and his remarkable nine-year journey at Liverpool.

programme.title: Mo Salah: Record Breaker
programme.desc: Former LFC striker Neil Mellor and Opta data editor Michael Reid crunch the numbers on Mohamed Salah¿s incredible Liverpool career, which saw the Egyptian King rewrite the record books.

programme.title: Liverpool¿s Greatest
programme.desc: The winner of our Liverpools Greatest poll is revealed. See who is crowned the Reds' best men's player of all time, after a huge vote with the views of fans, former players, journalists and more.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Southampton.

programme.title: Cup Kings
programme.desc: Enjoy back-to-back to back highlights of Liverpool¿s previous seven FA Cup Final triumphs.

programme.title: European Royalty: The Joy of Six
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary in which we relive Liverpool's sixth European Cup victory in Madrid - and the subsequent parade which brought the city to a standstill.

programme.title: How The Cup Was Won
programme.desc: Enjoy this round-by-round step back in time to the year Liverpool clinched their fifth success in the world's oldest knockout competition.

programme.title: Retro Reds - The Golden Hour
programme.desc: Relive classic LFC action from the archives. This week we recall the First Division fixtures against Stoke), Derby (), Sunderland () and Aston Villa ().

programme.title: Ultimate XI
programme.desc: Liverpool legend John Barnes takes on the role of fantasy manager and reveals who would make it into his Ultimate XI.

programme.title: Us and Them: Manchester United
programme.desc: A documentary examining the intense rivalry that exists between Liverpool and Manchester United - focusing on history, culture and, of course, the football.

programme.title: Liverpool's Sound
programme.desc: Kop Chants and their Origins - We explore the history of Liverpool's unique and unrivalled songbook in an exclusive documentary.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Frankfurt.

programme.title: All the Goals
programme.desc: Relive every single goal Luis Suarez scored for the Reds.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: Carragher
programme.desc: Upon his retirement in 2013, Jamie Carragher's former teammates, managers and opponents paid tribute to a true Anfield legend.

programme.title: Cup Kings
programme.desc: Relive the glory of Liverpool's previous six European Cup triumphs with back-to-back highlights of each victorious final.

programme.title: Robbo: My Liverpool
programme.desc: An exclusive LFC Original documentary paying tribute to Andy Robertson and his remarkable nine-year journey at Liverpool.

programme.title: Flags and Banners: The Art of LFC
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary which delves into the history and culture of the club's flags and banners.

programme.title: Mo Salah: Record Breaker
programme.desc: Former LFC striker Neil Mellor and Opta data editor Michael Reid crunch the numbers on Mohamed Salah¿s incredible Liverpool career, which saw the Egyptian King rewrite the record books.

programme.title: One Week In May...
programme.desc: The Story Of A Unique Treble: A documentary about the unforgettable 2000/01 season when Gerard Houllier¿s team charged to three trophies and Champions League qualification for the first time.

programme.title: Hobby House
programme.desc: Following the real daily life of a local card shop based in Lancaster, Pa. Go behind-the-scenes of sports cards and memorabilia through the eyes of a small, but successful, family-owned business.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: New York Knicks 2026 Championship Parade
programme.desc: Fans celebrate the New York Knicks' first NBA Championship in 53 years with a ticker-tape parade through the city's "Canyon of Heroes.".

programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Mercy Ships
programme.desc: Mercy Ship's crew of world-class medical volunteers sail across the globe providing lifesaving surgeries to those with nowhere else to turn.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: Carson Kressley ("Queer Eye for the Straight Guy") vs. Jaleel White ("Family Matters").

programme.title: Beat the Bridge
programme.desc: An interactive bridge dares players to cross by stepping on the right answers to challenging trivia questions; each step forward puts money in the team's bank, with bonus money for each successful crossing.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Switch
programme.desc: Jeff Hephner challenges contestants who are ranked based on their answers to trivia questions for a chance at $10,000; every question counts, as each answer can propel them to the top or to the bottom, where they'll be in jeopardy of elimination.

programme.title: Split Second
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins presents three contestants with a question and three possible choices and whoever buzzes in fastest earns the right to answer first.

programme.title: Tic Tac Dough
programme.desc: Two contestants compete to place three marks in a row on trivia board avoiding a dragon that can steal turns; the winner faces the dragon in a final round where it blocks three-in-a-row attempts to prevent the $10,000 prize win.

programme.title: Bingo Blitz
programme.desc: Contestants compete in a dynamic blend of trivia and bingo.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: Two teams of friends and family race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: Forgotten Jews
programme.desc: Join the International Fellowship of Christians and Jews to rush emergency food boxes to elderly Jews in war-torn Ukraine. Holocaust survivors are going hungry because they can't afford both food and medicine. Your support is needed now.

programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Kash & Matty Talkin' Golf
programme.desc: Award winning golf journalist Steve Kashul, and Chicago area golf guru Matt Smith talk golf covering top Chicago area, Midwest, and national golf topics. programme.title: Whitetail Diaries
programme.desc: "Whitetail Diaries" showcases the best hunting stories from across the country that highlight North America's most popular game animal, the whitetail deer. Host Wade Middleton, an avid outdoorsman and hunting enthusiast, visits others who share his passions and joins them as they hunt using a variety of techniques. Middleton also shares stories of his own hunting excursions during the show, incorp

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: Athens Regional, Game 3.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Orange (3-8, 1-6 ACC) and Eagles (1-10, 0-7) close out the 2025 campaign with this tilt. Boston College has won two straight meetings, and four of its last five visits to Syracuse. The programs have lost a combined 17 consecutive outings.

programme.title: Women's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: From Newton Campus Lacrosse and Soccer Field in Newton, Mass.

programme.desc: Championship.

programme.desc: Championship.

programme.title: Women's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: Championship.

programme.title: Women's College Basketball
programme.desc: The Cardinals and Blue Devils clash in a massive ACC Championship showdown. Louisville enters on a solid two-game winning streak, while Duke brings their own late-season momentum. The ultimate ACC conference crown is on the line today.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: T. Rowe Price ACC Tournament concludes as No.1 Duke and No.10 Virginia fight for the title. The Blue Devils won the regular-season meeting, but the Cavaliers have won four straight games. A spot in the NCAA Tournament as a top seed is on the line.

programme.title: Oregon Volleyball Classic
programme.desc: From Aug. 27, 2011.

programme.title: Oregon Volleyball Classic
programme.desc: From Sept. 25, 2022.

programme.title: Oregon Football Classic
programme.desc: From Nov. 24, 2023.

programme.title: Oregon Football Classic
programme.desc: From Sept. 11, 2021.

programme.title: Oregon Football Classic
programme.desc: From Sept. 8, 2007.

programme.title: Oregon Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Satou Sabally scored 25 points and Sabrina Ionescu had 23 points to help the 8th-ranked Ducks beat the 10th-ranked Bruins 101-94 in overtime. From Feb. 19, 2018.

programme.title: Oregon Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Sabrina Ionescu scored 37 points to become the Oregon women's basketball all-time leading scorer in the 6th-ranked Ducks' victory over the 3rd-ranked Cardinal. From Jan. 16, 2020.

programme.title: Oregon Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Nate Bittle had 20 points and six rebounds to help lead the Ducks to an 85-71 victory over the Badgers. From Feb. 25, 2026.

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: From Easton Stadium in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Raevyn Rogers, Deajah Stevens-Mitchell, Maggie Schmaedick Jones, coach Curtis Taylor and more take a look back on the events leading up to Oregon Women's Track and Field's historic NCAA "Triple Crown" victory in 2017.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From PK Park in Eugene, Ore.

programme.title: Oregon Football Classic
programme.desc: Dillon Gabriel threw four touchdowns to help top-ranked Ducks beat 3rd-ranked Nittany Lions, 45-37, to earn the program's first Big Ten title.

programme.title: Oregon Football Classic
programme.desc: Dante Moore passed for three touchdowns to help the 6th-ranked Ducks beat the 3rd-ranked Nittany Lions 30-24 in double-overtime. From Sept. 27, 2025.

programme.title: Oregon Volleyball Classic
programme.desc: Gabby Gonzales led Oregon with 13 kills in their 3-1 victory over 6th-ranked Washington State. From Oct. 27, 2023.

programme.title: Oregon Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Dante N'Faly scored 25 points to lead the Ducks to a 75-68 victory over the Buffaloes to clinch the Pac-12 Tournament title. From March 16, 2024.

programme.title: Oregon Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Dillon Brooks hit a three-pointer in the final second to lift the 21st-ranked Ducks to an 89-87 victory over the 2nd-ranked Bruins. From Dec. 28, 2016.

programme.title: Oregon Football Classic
programme.desc: Atticus Sappington kicked the game-winning field goal with three seconds remaining to lift the 9th-ranked Ducks to an 18-16 victory over the 20th-ranked Hawkeyes. From Nov. 8, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Welcome
programme.desc: A closer look at Oregon's state-of-the-art facilities and historic programs. Big Ten Network's Mike Hall speaks with football head coach Dan Lanning, track and field head coach Jerry Schumacher and more, as they share the uniqueness of Eugene.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From Husky Ballpark in Seattle.

programme.title: The Shoulders of Giants
programme.desc: A look at historical Big Ten figures whose accomplishments paved the way for current achievements.

programme.title: Iowa Football Classic
programme.desc: Nick Bell rushes for 168 yards and two touchdowns in the 13th-ranked Hawkeyes' 54-28 win over the 5th-ranked Fighting Illini. From Nov. 3, 1990.

programme.title: Iowa Football Classic
programme.desc: Ryan Hansen caught the game clinching interception in the end zone to secure the Hawkeyes a 26-23 victory over the Nittany Lions in double-overtime. From Nov. 4, 2000.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: The events leading up to the first Hawkeye Wave which has now become a tradition celebrated during every Iowa home game, where fans, players and coaches exchange waves with patients and families inside UI Stead Family Children's Hospital.

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: From April 12, 2017.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: Game 6.

programme.title: Iowa Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Monika Czinano had a double-double with 30 points and 10 rebounds to help lead the Hawkeyes to a 74-67 victory over the Hoosiers to win the Big Ten Championship. From March 6, 2022.

programme.title: Iowa Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Megan Gustafson scored a Big Ten Championship game record 45 points to lift the 2nd-seeded Hawkeyes to victory over the top-seeded Terrapins. From March 10, 2019.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Caitlin Clark, Payton Sandfort and more take a look back on Iowa basketball's dramatic wins over Indiana and Michigan State during one weekend in February 2023 at Carver-Hawkeye Arena.

programme.title: Iowa Football Classic
programme.desc: Keith Duncan kicks a 48-yard field goal with one second remaining to push the 17th-ranked Hawkeyes past the Cornhuskers 27-24 in Lincoln. From Nov. 29, 2019.

programme.title: Iowa Football Classic
programme.desc: Iowa Freshman Keith Duncan kicks a game-winning 33-yard field goal as time expires to upset the 3rd-ranked Wolverines under the lights in Iowa City. From Nov. 12, 2016.

programme.title: Iowa Football Classic
programme.desc: After being down at halftime, the 11th-ranked Hawkeyes score 17 unanswered points in the second half and defeat the Badgers 20-10 at Camp Randall Stadium.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: The events leading up to Rob Houghtlin's last-second field goal that secured a victory for top-ranked Iowa over 2nd-ranked Michigan in 1985.

programme.title: Iowa Wrestling Classic
programme.desc: From Nov. 14, 2015.
